title: J-type star skiff
content:
{{Top|canon=J-type Naboo star skiff}} {{Otheruses|J-type}} {{TCWRetcon}} {{StarshipClass |image=[[File:Nabooskiff-SWCTP.png]] |name=J-type star skiff |designer= |manufacturer=[[Theed Palace Space Vessel Engineering Corps/Legends|Theed Palace Space Vessel Engineering Corps]]/[[Nubia Star Drives, Incorporated/Legends|Nubia Star Drives, Incorporated]]{{DB|starship|naboostarskiff|Naboo star skiff}} |line=J-type star skiff |model=Modified J-type star skiff |type=[[Yacht/Legends|Star yacht]] |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length=29.2 meters |width=49.3 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed=1050 km/h |maneuverability= |engine=[[Sossen-7 sublight engine]]s (2) |hyperdrive=Class 0.5 |hdrange= |hdsystem=Modified hyperdrive system |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen=Equipped |hull=Reinforced hull with [[Chromium/Legends|chromium]] plating |sensor=Equipped |target=Equipped |navigation=Equipped |avionics=Equipped |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=Top-mounted [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] (2) |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew=*Pilot (1) *Navigator (1) *Gunner (1) |skeleton= |passengers=3 |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |availability= |role=*[[Transport/Legends|Transport]] *Personal starship |firstuse= |retired= |affiliation=*[[Royal House of Naboo/Legends|Royal House of Naboo]] **[[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] }} The '''J-type star skiff''', also known as the '''Naboo star skiff''', was a [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] created by the [[Theed Palace Space Vessel Engineering Corps/Legends|Theed Palace Space Vessel Engineering Corps]] for the [[Royal House of Naboo/Legends|Royal House]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. It was referred to as a star skiff due to its primary purpose as a passenger [[Transport/Legends|transport]], a role often shared by the common [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] surface vehicles known as [[Skiff/Legends|skiffs]]. ==Characteristics== [[File:ApproachingCatoNeimoidia-SS.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Padmé Amidala's star skiff approaches Cato Neimoidia.]] The J-type star skiff symbolized the changes sweeping through [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in the final days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Though the star skiff retained the sleek, teardrop-shaped main hull and wide, sweeping wings of previous royal cruisers, a duller finish, exposed access grills and discolored [[Sossen-7 sublight engine]]s indicated that the star skiff was a product of turbulent times. Perhaps most shocking of all for a Naboo royal vessel was the inclusion of a pair of top-mounted [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]]. The J-type star skiff was 29 meters in length, and 49.3 meters wing to wing. Inside, It had a remarkably fast 0.5 hyperdrive and was spacious despite its small size. The Naboo star skiff was equipped with lockers and a medical suite, in addition to the standard cabins and compartments. It could also hold up to 6 passengers. The star skiff was ''not'' designed for direct confrontation however, but its speed and agility allowed for quick escapes so the ship could recover from any damage it might sustain. Although it was far too expensive to be produced en masse, the J-type functioned as a refueling partner for the [[N-1 starfighter/Legends|N-1 starfighter]] when needed. ==History==
[[File:Nabooskiff3-chron.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala's]] star skiff.]]
Though designed for [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Apailana/Legends|Apailana]], the current monarch continued Naboo's tradition of gratitude towards the services of former Queen [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala]] by allowing her to use the star skiff. As a rule, only the planet's monarch could own a vessel sheathed in [[Chromium/Legends|chromium]], but Padmé's popularity and loyalty to Naboo superseded such tradition. Though Padmé was more than capable of piloting the star skiff, she often left the duty of flying the ship to Captain [[Gregar Typho/Legends|Gregar Typho]] or [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]. J-type star skiffs were also used by contemporary prominent individuals in the Republic. Padmé Amidala used this vessel to negotiate with [[Ziro Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Ziro Desilijic Tiure]] over siding with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]]; however Ziro was not interested in what she was saying. She also flew this ship to [[Cato Neimoidia/Legends|Cato Neimoidia]] with [[Rush Clovis/Legends|Rush Clovis]] acting as a spy for the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] to see if he was bargaining with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] she used this ship to go to [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] during her attempt to find her husband, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], just after the conclusion of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Unbeknownst to her, [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] had stowed aboard the ship, and this led to a [[Duel on Mustafar/Legends|fateful duel]]. [[File:Naboo_star_skiff_1.png|left|thumb|Padmé Amidala's star skiff on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].]] Obi-Wan Kenobi also flew Padmé Amidala in the yacht to the medical facility at [[Polis Massa Research Base|Polis Massa Base]], after Anakin had employed a [[Telekinesis/Legends#Force choke|Force choke]] upon her. After the death of Amidala the star skiff was put to rest by the Naboo as it was a painful reminder of what had happened to their former [[Queen/Legends|Queen]]. Other [[Senator/Legends|Senators]], however, continued to purchase these ships to improve their standing. ==Behind the scenes== The Naboo star skiff resembles the [[Wikipedia:RQ-3 Dark Star|RQ-3 Dark Star]] [[Wikipedia:Unmanned aerial vehicle|unmanned aerial vehicle]] and the [[Wikipedia:Northrop YB-49|Northrop YB-49]] bomber plane. Concept Design Supervisor Ryan Church sketched the skiff as having add-on and modified features, to suggest that it had been "supercharged" for combat. During principal photography, very little of the ship was constructed -- only its boarding ramp was built full scale. The interior cockpit environment was digitally stitched together from background plates of the [[H-type Nubian yacht|Naboo yacht]] interior from [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|Episode II]], with new footage of characters seated in the yacht's chairs against greenscreen. During pickup photography, new scenes set in the deeper interior of the ship necessitated the construction of a fully enclosed set that featured the ship's locker bay and medical suite. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of J-type star skiffs}} *[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (film)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' film]] *''[[The Clone Wars: Departure]]'' *''[[The Clone Wars: Bombad Jedi]]'' *{{TCW|Senate Spy}} *{{TCW|The Rise of Clovis}} *{{Film|III}} {{1st}} *[[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (junior novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'' junior novelization]] *[[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'' video game]] *[[Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith 4|''Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith'' 4]] *''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]'' {{C|in holorecord}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of J-type star skiffs}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' *[[Star Wars Insider 82|''Star Wars Insider'' 82]] *[[Star Wars: Complete Locations (2005)|''Star Wars: Complete Locations'']] *''[[Star Wars Chronicles: The Prequels]]'' *[[Starships of the Galaxy (Saga Edition)|''Starships of the Galaxy'', Saga Edition]] *''[[Star Wars Fandex Deluxe Edition]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{ID|Naboo star skiff}} *{{DB|starship|naboostarskiff|Naboo star skiff}} *''[[Suns of Fortune]]'' *{{BuildFalconCite|8|Guide to the Galaxy}} {{Po}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=J-Typ Naboo Starskiff |es=Esquife estelar tipo J |nl=J-Type Star Skiff }} [[Category:Nubia Star Drives, Incorporated products]] [[Category:Star skiff classes]] [[Category:Starship classes of the Galactic Republic]] [[Category:Theed Palace Space Vessel Engineering Corps products]]
